case_title: JEFFREY LAWTON VS. CINTA AVEDA INSTITUTE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $40.00 SERVED NOV-03-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CINTA AVEDA INSTITUTE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,914.34 FILED BY LAWTON, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT CINTA AVEDA INSTITUTE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWTON, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CINTA AVEDA INSTITUTE, INC. $810.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, THE CONTRACT ENTERED IN TO BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ON OR ABOUT APRIL 2014, IS RESCINDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
